prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为9087名、8780名、8940名、5731名、6182名。2024年因选科要求调整为物理、化学双必选，位次大幅前移至5731名，2025年小幅后移至6182名，近两年基本稳定在5700–6200名区间；该校在上海市招生计划2021–2026年连续六年均为4人，计划人数完全持平，无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学（盘锦校区）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享大连理工大学主校学科资源；软科中国大学排名主校约第28名，属国内顶尖工科院校层次，盘锦校区毕业证与主校一致，对考生有较强吸引力；该校近年声誉偏负面，2021年曾发生校园安全事件，2024年有投档线异常传闻，2026年声誉评价仍偏负面；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等。整体声誉对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；大连理工大学拥有化学工程与技术（A+）、力学（A）、土木工程（A）、机械工程（A）、管理科学与工程（A）、软件工程（A）、生物医学工程（A）等10个A-及以上学科。盘锦校区在沪招生专业中，能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术（A+），生物科学类/生物信息学对应生物医学工程（A）等相关学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年在沪招生专业为能源化学工程、生物制造、生物信息学，均属化工与生物类方向。社会舆论中"生化环材"大类整体偏劝退，但该校化学工程与技术为A+王牌学科，对高分考生仍有吸引力；本省2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年的49276人增长约35%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，距上海较远；上海考生对本地及长三角高校偏好明显，对东北地区高校存在一定地域偏好差异，可能轻微影响报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次基本稳定在5700–6200名区间、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数大幅增长约35%导致竞争加剧、招生专业偏冷门（化工与生物类）及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约6102名，区间5602–6602名。

- 能源化学工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 生物信息学。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在沪招生专业较少（仅3个），且均属化工与生物类方向。位次在预测区间内（5602–6602名）建议以能源化学工程（A+王牌）为主攻目标，生物信息学与生物制造作为稳妥选择。位次明显优于区间上限（<5602名）可重点冲刺能源化学工程；位次接近区间下限（>6602名）则需谨慎考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive subjects were 9087, 8780, 8940, 5731, and 6182 respectively. In 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to mandatory physics and chemistry, the ranking significantly advanced to 5731, and slightly moved back to 6182 in 2025, stabilizing in the 5700–6200 range in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai has been consistently 4 students for six consecutive years from 2021 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction signals, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main campus. The main campus ranks approximately 28th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities. The graduation certificate of the Panjin Campus is identical to that of the main campus, which strongly attracts candidates. However, the university's reputation has been somewhat negative in recent years, with a campus safety incident in 2021, abnormal admission line rumors in 2024, and still negative reputation evaluation in 2026. Its Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. Overall reputation has a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. Dalian University of Technology has 10 A- or above disciplines, including Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+), Mechanics (A), Civil Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Software Engineering (A), and Biomedical Engineering (A). Among the majors enrolled in Shanghai at the Panjin Campus, Energy Chemical Engineering corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+), and Biological Sciences/Bioinformatics corresponds to Biomedical Engineering (A) and related disciplines, highlighting strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the majors enrolled in Shanghai are Energy Chemical Engineering, Biomanufacturing, and Bioinformatics, all in the chemical and biological fields. In public opinion, the broad category of 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' is generally discouraged, but the university's Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A+ flagship discipline, still attractive to high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, far from Shanghai. Shanghai candidates have a clear preference for local and Yangtze River Delta universities, with some regional preference differences for universities in Northeast China, which may slightly affect application willingness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the basic stability of rankings in the 5700–6200 range from 2024 to 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in this province leading to intensified competition, relatively unpopular majors (chemical and biological fields), and negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6102, with a range of 5602–6602.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university has few majors enrolled in Shanghai (only 3), all in chemical and biological fields. For rankings within the predicted range (5602–6602), it is recommended to target Energy Chemical Engineering (A+ flagship) as the main goal, with Bioinformatics and Biomanufacturing as safe choices. For rankings significantly above the upper limit (<5602), focus on sprinting for Energy Chemical Engineering; for rankings near the lower limit (>6602), careful consideration is needed.
